subject: Re: max number of frames with K3 data?
body:
On Tue, Apr 23, 2019 at 8:34 AM Dimitry Tegunov <tegunov@gmail.com> wrote:

> Ok, it's fixed now, and an old Titan X with 12 GB seems to be enough for the full pipeline, assuming 2x downsampling of the superres data. I'll share the updated installer once I've accumulated a few more fixes.

Excellent.  We look forward to testing it out.

In the meantime, we'll downsample some of our superres data.  What did
you use to do that on the sample micrograph I sent?

By the way, it's terrific seeing a high-quality Windows application
created for cryo-EM.  WPF is an outstanding framework.

Matt
